messages.content: I had made a youtbe shorts from jhonny lever podcast with ranveer allahbadia in which jhonny says "You respect your parents, but I am not afraid of them. There should be something in life to fear. Fear is necessary, otherwise we stand a full chance of going astray. The anchor says, 'Yes, there should be some person or a fear of the God above that you fear. Fear is fear, right? You protect yourself from it. I think fear has saved me somewhere. No, I shouldn’t do this. What will I think? No, this is not right, this is not good. This fear is needed. Oh man, because success from any angle, according to me, is a very big poison. It is intoxicating. It is poison. It should be turned into laughter. It saddens me because I have seen many of our seniors. When you study their old age, you can learn from them too. As an example, many." now make Strong SEO title for youtube shorts

"Darr Zaruri Hai: Johnny Lever's Key to Success | Ranveer Podcast Gems"
description

Discover the insightful wisdom of legendary comedian Johnny Lever in this captivating clip from his podcast interview with Ranveer Allahbadia. In this short yet powerful segment, Johnny shares his profound perspective on why fear is an essential part of life—how it can guide us to respect boundaries, make prudent choices, and keep us from straying off our paths. Delving into the influence of success, he labels it a 'poison' that must be balanced with laughter and humility. This highlight from Ranveer's podcast offers a rare glimpse into Lever's life experiences and the lessons he's learned from observing the lives of the seniors around him. Tune in for an enlightening experience that reveals how respecting parents, fearing the consequences, and embracing fear can contribute to a disciplined, successful life. #Wisdom #JohnnyLever #DarrZaruriHai #SuccessTips #LifeLessons #RanveerPodcast

Title:
"Johnny Lever's Fear Mantra Defines Success | Epic Podcast Snippet with Ranveer"

Description:
Step into the realm of wisdom with Johnny Lever's compelling narrative on the necessity of fear for leading a balanced life. In this YouTube Short from Ranveer Allahbadia's influential podcast, the iconic comedian unveils his unique perspective on using fear as a tool to avoid life's pitfalls. Despite success's intoxicating nature, Lever suggests transforming it into a force for good, using laughter as an antidote. This short snippet is packed with potent insights from a seasoned artist who has witnessed both the highs and lows of stardom. If you're seeking guidance or a fresh outlook on life, this clip will not disappoint. Don't miss out on these golden nuggets of knowledge—subscribe now for more inspiring content! #JohnnyLeverPhilosophy #PowerOfFear #CelebrityLifeLessons #ComedyWisdom #RanveerPodcast
